name: codex-canvas
description: Local infinite canvas for Codex image generation and editing workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Open a local infinite canvas for Codex images.
interface.longDescription: Codex Canvas adds a project-local infinite canvas to Codex. It can open a browser canvas, collect ImageGen outputs, run background image-edit jobs, split images into editable element layers, and send selected canvas images back to a bound Codex thread.
defaultPrompt: Generate an image and collect it on canvas
